form.formComment: Well supported last time and rocketed out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but had to settle for the minor money, finishing a 0.8 lengths second (22.63) over 400m at this track. Recorded one of the quickest times on the card last time despite being beaten. Follow up.

formComments.title: TAB

Recorded one of the quickest times on the card last time despite being beaten. Follow up.

form.formComment: Had been in consistent form with three minors on end before missing the frame last start when fourth (26.07) at this track. Aided by a low draw but prefer each-way.

formComments.comment: Had been in consistent form with three minors on end before missing the frame last start when fourth (26.07) at this track. Aided by a low draw but prefer each-way.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 460m at this track. Looking to others this time.

formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 460m at this track. Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 400m. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and tends to spot them a start in her races, Last start finished fifth over 460m at this track, beaten 6 lengths. Needs to find a bit more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and tends to spot them a start in her races, Last start finished fifth over 460m at this track, beaten 6 lengths. Needs to find a bit more.

form.formComment: Racing well without winning, recording three minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when third (25.51) over 450m at Shepparton. Rates highly on best form. Expected to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Racing well without winning, recording three minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when third (25.51) over 450m at Shepparton. Rates highly on best form. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Won again in an impressive display after running them ragged to make it two on end at Sale over 510m (28.64). Has the ability and looks a key chance again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won again in an impressive display after running them ragged to make it two on end at Sale over 510m (28.64). Has the ability and looks a key chance again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by a neck at Sale over 510m (28.76) beating Dr. Fanatical in Grade 4/5 on December 19. The form out of the last run measures up. Among the chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to win by a neck at Sale over 510m (28.76) beating Dr. Fanatical in Grade 4/5 on December 19. The form out of the last run measures up. Among the chances.

form.formComment: Was in a purple patch of form before proving a little disappointing last start, finishing fifth at this track over 460m. This looks too tough.

form.formComment: Produced a good effort last start to finish second on April 10 over 400m at this track behind Bowie Sunny, beaten 2 lengths (23.06) in a Grade 5. Others have better credentials.
